researchSkipReason: in-house store reads over existing ProjectStore; no external deps or research. inspect/list are retargets to the store; ProjectStore::list() is trivial over the in-mem HashMap and the Pg table (deps already present from p6); p6 archival is the openspec CLI.

build_required.summary: Retarget project.inspect to TargetPort::Store; dispatch_store arm -> store.get by project_id (whole aggregate; unknown id clean error; no forge call)
Add ProjectStore::list() to the port + both adapters (InMemory values().cloned(); Pg SELECT body); retarget project.list to Store
